query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_assessments,
  SUM(CASE 
    WHEN physics_analysis LIKE '%impactAngleDegrees%' 
     AND physics_analysis LIKE '%calculatedImpactForceKN%'
     AND physics_analysis LIKE '%impactLocationNormalized%'
    THEN 1 ELSE 0 
  END) as quantitative_count,
  SUM(CASE 
    WHEN physics_analysis LIKE '%quantitativeMode":true%'
    THEN 1 ELSE 0 
  END) as quantitative_mode_count
FROM ai_assessments
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
